name: israeli-bank-scrapers-service
description: On-demand Israeli bank scrapers; writes to ledger for TUI/Web bank-accounts API

scripts.health: node -e "require('http').get('http://localhost:8010/api/health', r=>{ let d=''; r.on('data',c=>d+=c); r.on('end',()=>console.log(d)); }).on('error',e=>console.error(e));"
